name: border-glow
title: Border Glow
description: Pointer directed border glow wrapper with optional soft bloom.

api.description: Card chrome with a pointer-directed border. Use bloom for the soft mesh glow, or trace for the outer hairline.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the outer wrapper.

props.name: variant
props.description: default uses the dark face (neutral-920). light uses a soft white face and tinted mesh, and stays subtle white under dark theme.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Card face fill. Omit to use --df-border-glow-bg or --df-border-glow-light-bg.

props.name: strokeColor
props.description: Idle CSS border color. Omit to use --df-border-glow-stroke or --df-border-glow-light-stroke.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Corner radius in pixels. Omit to use --df-border-glow-radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

groups.title: Bloom
groups.description: Soft outer glow and directional mesh. Ignored when trace is true.

props.name: bloom
props.description: Soft outer bloom around the card. Set false to disable bloom (inner wash defaults to 0). Ignored when trace is true.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Soft outer glow source when bloom is true. Prefer a CSS color. HSL channels as "H S L" still work. In trace mode, used as the single hairline ink when colors is omitted.

props.name: glowRadius
props.description: How far the soft outer bloom extends beyond the card in pixels. Omit to use --df-border-glow-glow-radius.

props.name: glowIntensity
props.description: Multiplier for bloom opacity (0.1 to 3).

props.name: edgeSensitivity
props.description: How close the pointer must be to the edge for the glow to appear (0 to 100). Lower values light the edge sooner.

props.name: coneSpread
props.description: Width of the directional cone mask as a percentage (5 to 45).

props.name: colors
props.description: Three colors for the mesh gradient border. Defaults to --df-border-glow-color-* or --df-border-glow-light-color-*.

props.name: fillOpacity
props.default: 0.5 when bloom; 0 when bloom is false
props.description: Strength of the near edge mesh fill inside the card (0 to 1).

props.name: animated
props.description: Play an intro cone sweep on mount.

groups.title: Trace
groups.description: Hairline only animation. Forces bloom off and no face wash. The arc expands from zero at the pointer, then follows it.

props.name: trace
props.description: Enable hairline trace mode. Paints only the outer hairline (masked to the border, never the face).

props.name: glowColor
props.description: Single hairline ink when colors is omitted.

props.name: colors
props.description: Up to four colors along the expanding hairline arc. Pass DEFAULT_SPECTRUM_COLORS from SpectrumText for the kit spectrum.

props.name: coneSpread
props.description: Max lit arc length. Higher values make a longer hairline segment.

props.name: outlineOffset
props.description: Gap in pixels between the card edge and the outer hairline. Omit in trace mode to use --df-border-glow-trace-outline-offset.

props.name: outlineWidth
props.description: Thickness in pixels of the outer hairline. Omit to use --df-border-glow-outline-width.

props.name: followDuration
props.description: Seconds for the lit arc to ease toward the pointer. Lower is snappier; higher is smoother.

props.name: revealDuration
props.description: Seconds for the hairline to expand from zero on enter and collapse on leave. Uses a quint ease out curve.

props.name: arcFade
props.description: How soft the ends of the lit arc are (0 to 1). Higher fades out earlier and more gradually.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-border-glow-bg
props.description: Default (dark) card face.

props.name: --df-border-glow-stroke
props.description: Idle CSS border color on the default card.

props.name: --df-border-glow-radius
props.description: Default corner radius when borderRadius is omitted.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.

props.name: --df-border-glow-edge-sensitivity
props.description: Theme default for edgeSensitivity (0 to 100).

props.name: --df-border-glow-glow-radius
props.description: Theme default for glowRadius.

props.name: --df-border-glow-outline-offset
props.description: Gap between the card edge and the outer outline when bloom is off.

props.name: --df-border-glow-trace-outline-offset
props.description: Gap between the card edge and the outer hairline in trace mode.

props.name: --df-border-glow-outline-width
props.description: Thickness of the outer hairline in trace mode.

props.name: --df-border-glow-trace-follow
props.description: Theme default for followDuration in seconds.

props.name: --df-border-glow-trace-reveal
props.description: Theme default for revealDuration in seconds.

props.name: --df-border-glow-trace-fade
props.description: Theme default for arcFade (0 to 1).

props.name: --df-border-glow-cone-spread
props.description: Theme default for coneSpread in bloom modes.

props.name: --df-border-glow-glow-intensity
props.description: Theme default for glowIntensity.

props.name: --df-border-glow-fill-opacity
props.description: Theme default for fillOpacity on the default variant.

props.name: --df-border-glow-ink-base
props.description: Default soft outer glow source color.

props.name: --df-border-glow-color-1
props.description: Default mesh stop 1.

props.name: --df-border-glow-color-2
props.description: Default mesh stop 2.

props.name: --df-border-glow-color-3
props.description: Default mesh stop 3.

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-bg
props.description: Light variant face. Soft white under .dark (neutral-50).

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-stroke
props.description: Idle CSS border color on the light variant.

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-ink-base
props.description: Light variant soft outer glow source color.

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-color-1
props.description: Light variant mesh stop 1.

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-color-2
props.description: Light variant mesh stop 2.

props.name: --df-border-glow-light-color-3
props.description: Light variant mesh stop 3.
